Claim_Text: Universal zero-shot BCCB replacement is unsupported
What_It_Supports: Qwen3-VL visual mean BCCB R2 is weak and replacement error is high
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Temporal transport or trained local kernels

Claim_Text: Wan contains conditional geometry-aligned cyclic structure
What_It_Supports: Selected Wan heads and layers show coordinate-dependent 3D cyclic structure
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Universal BCCB attention or real denoising quality
Required_Next_Action: Run real-latent loss and quality interventions

What_It_Supports: Oracle hybrid is accurate but source support transfer fails
Required_Next_Action: Train and measure a causal low-cost router

Claim_Text: Ranked sparse routes can be task-functional
What_It_Supports: Top selected routes affect CIFAR-10 loss and predictions
BCM needs low-rank correction on some weights
Required_Next_Action: Keep as a separate compression extension

Claim_Text: Two-timescale memory improves the matched task Pareto frontier
What_It_Supports: Exact recent evidence plus causal subspace memory improves hidden-vector retention at matched bytes
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Language-conditioned task quality or measured latency
Required_Next_Action: Run delayed-query and current-scene tasks with three seeds

Claim_Text: The two-timescale memory result generalizes across encoders
What_It_Supports: Mechanism is not specific to one frozen visual tower
Required_Next_Action: Repeat the formal memory and task gate on Qwen or a second public encoder

Claim_Text: Temporal state has a useful layer-selective low-dimensional component
What_It_Supports: Rank-32 token-normalized energy passes 19 of 25 cells and layers 22 and 23 are consistent
What_It_Does_Not_Support: All hidden states are low rank or causal reconstruction is sufficient
Required_Next_Action: Test language-conditioned preservation with exact recent evidence

Claim_Text: The current prediction-innovation proxy is not semantically block sparse
What_It_Supports: The residual joint gate passes 0 of 25 formal cells
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Semantic event sparsity on annotated tasks
Required_Next_Action: Remove event routing from the current method and defer semantic follow-up

Claim_Text: Local BTTB has a limited motion regime but BCCB has no cyclic advantage
What_It_Supports: BTTB passes 9 of 20 eligible cells while BCCB adds only 0.037 percent mean gain
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Downstream task benefit or optimized latency
Required_Next_Action: Keep BTTB optional and remove BCCB from the contribution

Claim_Text: Exact recent evidence and consolidated memory are complementary at the representation level
What_It_Supports: The hybrid removes memory-only current-scene dilution and improves longer-delay retention
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Semantic complementarity or universal optimal allocation
Required_Next_Action: Repeat the instant-frame and rank allocation ablation on tasks

Claim_Text: Memory is bounded independently of stream duration
What_It_Supports: All retained state bytes remain constant with duration
Required_Next_Action: Audit GPU CPU and archive bytes over time

Claim_Text: Tail latency improves at comparable task quality
What_It_Supports: P50 P95 P99 and throughput improve on target hardware
Required_Next_Action: Implement batched kernels and synchronized timing

Claim_Text: Any optional transport gate is net beneficial
What_It_Supports: Gate cost is smaller than avoided or improved processing
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Task quality or latency benefit from the current proxy probes
Required_Next_Action: Implement only if the two-timescale task MVP leaves a motion-specific failure slice

Claim_Text: Fixed-budget memory is an established competing direction
What_It_Supports: CausalMem uses an online semantic basis under a fixed token budget
Event-VStream triggers updates at semantic events and keeps persistent memory
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Our component attribution and budget contract

Claim_Text: Low-rank plus sparse online decomposition is not new
What_It_Supports: Online RPCA separates slowly changing low-dimensional and sparse components
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Neural semantic state or structured spatial transport

Claim_Text: Fixed-capacity recurrent video state is an established baseline
What_It_Supports: StateKV carries cross-frame context in fixed capacity
What_It_Does_Not_Support: Event innovation and local structured transport
